query: I want to try a few different sidebar layouts for this app — maybe one with icons only, one with full labels, and a collapsible one. Let me see them side by side
here's a screenshot from Linear that I really love the feel of [image]. Can you save this to my mood board?
let's prototype a mobile chat interface, something that feels like iMessage but with AI features. Start with a basic version and we'll iterate
I pasted some color palette inspiration earlier — can you add it to the 'warm tones' board?
the current dashboard prototype feels too boxy and rigid. Make it more organic and airy, maybe with more rounded corners and breathing room
show me the design gallery, I want to browse through what we've built so far
I want to vibe design a landing page for my SaaS product. Dark theme, modern, with a hero section and pricing table
can you map out the feature tree for our assistant product? I want to see how permissions, memory, and conversation features relate to each other
I've been collecting reference images and design thoughts — let me search through the bank for anything tagged with 'navigation'
archive the old modal-dialog prototype, we're going in a different direction. And create a new concept for a command palette instead
can you fix the bug in our login form? The submit button doesn't work when the email field has a + character in it
I need to set up a PostgreSQL database for my Next.js app. Can you help me with the prisma schema and the docker-compose file?
write unit tests for the UserService class — it handles registration, login, and password reset. Use vitest
review this pull request and check for any security issues, especially around the auth middleware changes
can you build me a REST API endpoint that takes a CSV file upload and returns the parsed data as JSON? Use Express
I need to refactor this 500-line React component into smaller pieces. It's the main dashboard page and it handles data fetching, state management, and rendering all in one file
help me set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions. I need it to run tests on PRs and deploy to Vercel on merge to main
my webpack build is taking 45 seconds. Can you look at the config and figure out why it's so slow? Maybe we need to split some chunks
I want to add dark mode to my existing Next.js app. It already uses Tailwind. Just need the toggle and the CSS variable setup
can you help me write a migration script to move our user data from MongoDB to PostgreSQL? About 50k records, need to preserve the timestamps
use the design studio
I'm not sure I like these designs. can we explore?
